overview: A beautiful AI character gallery and builder app. Browse a curated collection of AI woman character profiles, then create your own by customizing name, avatar style, personality, and traits through a smooth multi-step builder.
features: Gallery of pre-made AI character cards with avatars, names, personality labels, and trait tags
Character detail view with full personality description and background
Filter gallery by personality type and traits with URL-persisted state
Search characters by name or keyword
3-step character builder: Basic Info, Personality, Preview & Save
Avatar style selector with visual previews
